arts.ttl: Manchester United official at Fenerbahçe today – Travels to Istanbul for 19-year-old
arts.sum: Manchester United have sent a scout to Istanbul to watch Yusuf Akçiçek as Fenerbahçe take on Rangers in the Europa League. That’s according to journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu, who reports that Manchester United are watching the 19-year-old centre-back. arts.ttl: 'Proud' - Manchester United striker signs new contract
arts.sum: Ethan Wheatley has committed his future to Man United by signing a new long-term deal at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: “Proud moment” – Manchester United forward’s new contract confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United have today officially announced that young striker Ethan Wheatley has signed a new contract at Old Trafford. The 19-year-old looks like the latest big prospect to come through at Man Utd, who have a famous academy which has produced world class players for many decades now. arts.ttl: Manchester United injury boost offers Ruben Amorim two clear positives vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man United head coach will be able to call upon the services of Toby Collyer for the first time in a month against Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Manchester United ‘test the waters’ to sign Brazilian – Ready to move forward
arts.sum: Atalanta midfielder Ederson is of interest to Juventus but the Italian giants are going to face stiff competition from Manchester United and Manchester City. TuttoSport have looked at the Brazilian’s situation today, stating that Juventus tried to bring the 25-year-old to Turin last summer but their attempt failed, and they ended up signing Teun Koopmeiners. arts.ttl: Antony's agent bites back at Ruben Amorim's assessment of Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Antony's agent hits out at Ruben Amorim's assessment of his struggles at Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad star set for Man United transfer audition - and it's not Martin Zubimendi
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip as Real Sociedad's factory of talented footballers sees Ruben Amorim, reportedly, prepare a surprise move.

arts.ttl: Man City to unlock huge $1bn boost this summer - and Manchester United could benefit too
arts.sum: Manchester City look set for a share of a huge $1bn prize pot when they compete in the FIFA Club World Cup this summer in the USA.

arts.ttl: Man Utd urged to sell €160m trio by Amorim replacement
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Xavi has reportedly continued to make major transfer demands amid speculation that he could replace Ruben Amorim at Manchester United this summer. The former Barcelona head coach has reportedly identified Garnacho, Onana and De Ligt, who have a combined Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) of €161.5 million, as three expendable players, and he will look to offload the trio if Man Utd decide to hire him as Amorim’s successor.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville shows true colours as he opens up on deep Man Utd sadness
arts.sum: Gary Neville was in attendance as Manchester United suffered yet another blow in their dismal season by being knocked out of the FA Cup by Fulham, but not in his usual role
